## Type of change

- [ ] Logo addition / update
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm --filter web lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm --filter web build` passes
- [ ] No new env vars added without updating `.env.example`
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or PII included
- [ ] If touching `apps/web/src/app/api/` — input validated with `zod`, no SSRF, no `eval`
